## Checklist

- [ ] Neutral, professional tone; identifiers in backticks; no em-dashes.
- [ ] No claim that a record is "cryptographically verifiable" beyond what the current draft supports.
- [ ] `SPEC.md` and `CONFORMANCE.md` stay consistent with each other.
